narrative_beat: A profecia revelada — o texto bíblico de Apocalipse 13 iluminado por chamas como se o próprio livro soubesse o que está acontecendo agora

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.depth_of_field: Bible pages sharp in center, edges softly blurred

subject.primary: ancient leather-bound Bible open at Revelation chapter 13, pages glowing in gold and amber from candle held to the side, prophetic text in Latin and Hebrew visible in warm illuminated glow
subject.focal_point: the illuminated open pages, text glowing as if alive
subject.secondary: human hand holding a thick white candle dripping crimson wax onto the lower margin of the pages
props: thick white wax candle dripping crimson wax
aged vellum pages with Latin/Hebrew script visible
crimson wax pools on page corner
floating orange embers rising from candle flame

environment.atmosphere: sacred dread, ancient knowledge meeting modern fulfillment

composition.rule: rule of thirds — book occupies left-center, candle enters right, Ken Burns slow pull-back
composition.foreground: Bible pages in gold and amber, crimson wax drips in foreground
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white stone monastery interior — arched ceiling, bare stone walls, wooden pews barely visible in shadow

lighting.key_light: single candle flame providing warm amber key light from right side, raking across page texture
lighting.fill_light: no fill — pure Caravaggio darkness surrounds
lighting.rim_light: faint crimson rim from off-camera source catching the leather Bible spine

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: awe and dread — the ancient text predicts the present moment

symbolism.primary: the open Bible as the key that unlocks understanding of what AI represents prophetically
symbolism.secondary: crimson wax dripping on prophetic pages — the cost of this knowledge is blood

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
